title: NodeBB Segment 01
summary: Early development segment of the NodeBB forum platform (PRs #5050-#5728). Covers a broad modernization pass including linting fixes, CSS/JS build pipeline overhaul (PostCSS, UglifyJS3, batched minification), internationalization updates across dozens of locales, translator module rewrites, admin control panel UI improvements, user profile and image cropping features, post/topic data layer changes, database abstraction upgrades, and schema migration infrastructure.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Early development segment of the NodeBB forum platform (PRs #5050-#5728). Covers a broad modernization pass including linting fixes, CSS/JS build pipeline overhaul (PostCSS, UglifyJS3, batched minification), internationalization updates across dozens of locales, translator module rewrites, admin control panel UI improvements, user profile and image cropping features, post/topic data layer changes, database abstraction upgrades, and schema migration infrastructure.

nodes.label: Internationalization / Locales
nodes.description: Translation JSON files for all supported locales. PRs in this segment add new language keys, update existing translations for admin, user, topic, and notification strings, and introduce new locale directories (Slovak, Thai, Ukrainian, etc.).

nodes.label: Client-Side JavaScript
nodes.description: Browser-side modules including ajaxify, translator, admin panels, topic post tools, account management, chat UI, picture cropper, notification sounds, and infinite scroll. PRs touch admin dashboard, settings, account editors, and module utilities.

nodes.label: Core Server Modules
nodes.description: Top-level server source files including app.js, webserver.js, upgrade.js, plugins.js, notifications.js, flags.js, messaging.js, and utility modules. PRs modernize async patterns, logging, plugin loading, and utility exports.

nodes.label: LESS Stylesheets
nodes.description: Admin and client LESS files for the forum UI. PRs update admin header styles, mobile ACP scrolling, and general layout improvements.

nodes.label: HTTP Controllers
nodes.description: Express route handlers for pages, authentication, topics, groups, users, mods, and API endpoints. PRs add flag management, fix redirect handling, and improve ACP search routing.

nodes.label: Socket.IO Handlers
nodes.description: Real-time event handlers for posts, topics, users, admin actions, and chat. PRs fix reply permissions, add vote visibility options, and improve post flag workflows.

nodes.label: Build System / Meta
nodes.description: Asset compilation pipeline including CSS minification (PostCSS/clean-css), JavaScript bundling (UglifyJS3), language compilation, theme management, and the build orchestrator. Major refactoring of the build pipeline.

nodes.label: User Module
nodes.description: User data layer including profile management, picture handling, account creation, admin operations, and authentication. PRs add optional fields to user creation, fix picture URL handling, and improve slugify deduplication.

nodes.label: Posts Module
nodes.description: Post creation, deletion, flagging, and category assignment. PRs introduce isMain payload tracking, sorted-set replies, vote indexing, and flag deletion checks.

nodes.label: Server-Side Templates
nodes.description: Tpl template files for admin pages (manage users, flags, settings), install flow, and public pages. PRs update markup for ACP screens and registration queue.

nodes.label: Topics Module
nodes.description: Topic creation, unread tracking, post listing, and teaser logic. PRs fix post-count types, add getUnreadTids hook, and improve edit history.

nodes.label: Database Abstraction
nodes.description: MongoDB and Redis database drivers with sorted set, hash, list, and key operations. PRs fix zset score parsing, improve lexical operations, and add index management.

nodes.label: Schema Upgrades
nodes.description: Versioned database migration scripts (1.0.0 through 1.5.1). PRs introduce file-based schema upgrade infrastructure and add migrations for bookmarks, flags refactoring, and post vote sorted sets.

nodes.label: Project Configuration
nodes.description: Root-level files including app.js entry point, nodebb CLI script, loader, package.json, .eslintrc, .gitignore, and CI configuration. PRs update linting rules, add coveralls, and modernize the CLI.

nodes.label: Express Middleware
nodes.description: Request processing middleware for headers, authentication, sessions, and rendering. PRs fix session timeout granularity and header processing.

nodes.label: Plugin System
nodes.description: Plugin loading, hook system, and plugin management. PRs refactor plugin load ordering and improve soundpack dependency installation.

nodes.label: Route Definitions
nodes.description: Express route registration for assets, API, authentication, and admin paths. PRs migrate asset routes and add sound/upload endpoints.

edges.label: compiles language files at build time
user data stored via database abstraction
server core loads and initializes plugins
